heading: Using the Cedar Policy Language
body:
MongoDB uses the open-source [Cedar policy language](https://docs.cedarpolicy.com/) to define Atlas Resource Policies.
Cedar's design balances expressiveness with simplicity, employing a concise syntax
that streamlines both writing and understanding resource policies.

To quickly create an Atlas Resource Policy, adapt the [examples](arp-examples) and add to Atlas
using the Atlas UI or Atlas Administration API by following [Create an Atlas Resource Policy Configuration](procedure-create-atlas-resource-policy).

To learn more about [Cedar policy language](https://docs.cedarpolicy.com/), see:

- [Key Cedar Syntax Elements for Atlas](key-cedar-elements)

- [Restrict Cloud Provider and Region](example-cedar-policy)

- [Cedar GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cedar-policy).
